heading: Tax on excess tax-exempt organization executive compensation
label: 4960 Tax on excess tax-exempt organization executive compensation
notes: Amendments2025—Subsec. (c)(2). amended par. (2) generally. children.text: so much of the remuneration paid (other than any excess parachute payment) by an applicable tax-exempt organization for the taxable year with respect to employment of any covered employee in excess of $1,000,000, plus
any excess parachute payment paid by such an organization to any covered employee.

children.heading: Liability for tax
children.label: b Liability for tax
children.text: The employer shall be liable for the tax imposed under subsection (a).

children.label: A
children.text: is exempt from taxation under section 501(a),

children.label: B
children.text: is a farmers’ cooperative organization described in section 521(b)(1),

children.label: C
children.text: has income excluded from taxation under section 115(1), or

children.label: D
children.text: is a political organization described in section 527(e)(1).

children.heading: Covered employee
children.label: 2 Covered employee
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “covered employee” means any employee of an applicable tax-exempt organization (or any predecessor of such an organization) and any former employee of such an organization (or predecessor) who was such an employee during any taxable year beginning after .December 31, 2016

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “remuneration” means wages (as defined in section 3401(a)), except that such term shall not include any designated Roth contribution (as defined in section 402A(c)) and shall include amounts required to be included in gross income under section 457(f).

children.heading: Exception for remuneration for medical services
children.label: B Exception for remuneration for medical services
children.text: The term “remuneration” shall not include the portion of any remuneration paid to a licensed medical professional (including a veterinarian) which is for the performance of medical or veterinary services by such professional.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Remuneration of a covered employee by an applicable tax-exempt organization shall include any remuneration paid with respect to employment of such employee by any related person or governmental entity.

children.label: i
children.text: controls, or is controlled by, the organization,

children.label: ii
children.text: is controlled by one or more persons which control the organization,

children.label: iii
children.text: is a supported organization (as defined in section 509(f)(3)) during the taxable year with respect to the organization,

children.label: iv
children.text: is a supporting organization described in section 509(a)(3) during the taxable year with respect to the organization, or

children.label: v
children.text: in the case of an organization which is a voluntary employees’ beneficiary association described in section 501(c)(9), establishes, maintains, or makes contributions to such voluntary employees’ beneficiary association.

children.label: i
children.text: the amount of remuneration paid by such employer with respect to such employee, bears to

children.label: ii
children.text: the amount of remuneration paid by all such employers to such employee.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “excess parachute payment” means an amount equal to the excess of any parachute payment over the portion of the base amount allocated to such payment.

children.label: i
children.text: such payment is contingent on such employee’s separation from employment with the employer, and

children.label: ii
children.text: the aggregate present value of the payments in the nature of compensation to (or for the benefit of) such individual which are contingent on such separation equals or exceeds an amount equal to 3 times the base amount.

children.label: i
children.text: described in section 280G(b)(6) (relating to exemption for payments under qualified plans),

children.label: ii
children.text: made under or to an annuity contract described in section 403(b) or a plan described in section 457(b),

children.label: iii
children.text: to a licensed medical professional (including a veterinarian) to the extent that such payment is for the performance of medical or veterinary services by such professional, or

children.label: iv
children.text: to an individual who is not a highly compensated employee as defined in section 414(q).

children.heading: Base amount
children.label: D Base amount
children.text: Rules similar to the rules of 280G(b)(3) shall apply for purposes of determining the base amount.

children.heading: Property transfers; present value
children.label: E Property transfers; present value
children.text: Rules similar to the rules of paragraphs (3) and (4) of section 280G(d) shall apply.

children.heading: Coordination with deduction limitation
children.label: 6 Coordination with deduction limitation
children.text: Remuneration the deduction for which is not allowed by reason of section 162(m) shall not be taken into account for purposes of this section.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: d Regulations
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe such regulations as may be necessary to prevent avoidance of the tax under this section, including regulations to prevent avoidance of such tax through the performance of services other than as an employee or by providing compensation through a pass-through or other entity to avoid such tax.
